name: System Owner or User Discover (Linux)
notes:
This rule detects system owner or user discovery activities.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: System Owner or User Discovery
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may use the information from System Owner/User Discovery during automated discovery to shape follow-on behaviors, including whether or not the adversary fully infects the target and/or attempts specific actions.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Command Arguments (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*?a0=\"(users|w|who)\".*?' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY System Owner or User Discover (Linux) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Command Arguments (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*?a0=\"(users|w|who)\".*?' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: System Owner or User Discovery (Linux)
Event description: Detects system owner or user discovery activities.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
